title: Personal Data Logged with Cross-Border Transmission Risk
description: Logging personal data that may be shipped to a centralised logging service in a non-EEA region constitutes a data transfer requiring GDPR Article 44 compliance.

finding.message: Personal data in log statement may be transferred cross-border at '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Redact personal data before sending logs to third-party aggregators.
Ensure log shipping infrastructure is covered by your DPA and transfer mechanisms.
Use EU-hosted log infrastructure or verify your logging SaaS provider has signed EU SCCs.
GDPR Article 28 requires a Data Processing Agreement with all processors.
